steps.title: Notice the sequence marker
steps.content: The previous sentence says a user first tags the photo with known information. The following sentence describes the facial-recognition software analyzing features and looking for matches. The transition must mark the next step in a process.

steps.title: Reject nonsequence transitions
steps.content: B would emphasize or clarify the previous statement, not move to the next step. C signals a similar parallel action, and D introduces an example; the software analysis is neither. The remaining transition follows naturally after "first." The answer is A.
